scripts.build: npm run build -w @quintask/shared && npm run build -w @quintask/api && npm run build -w @quintask/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @quintask/shared && npm run test -w @quintask/api && npm run test -w @quintask/web
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck -w @quintask/shared && npm run typecheck -w @quintask/api && npm run typecheck -w @quintask/web
